title: taraxacum hellenicum
intro: Taraxacum hellenicum, also known as the Greek dandelion or Hellenic dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum hellenicum include supporting liver function, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum hellenicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs for enhanced therapeutic effects.
